# Acceptable Use Policy — Employee Notice (Template)

> Customer-facing template. Replace `[Company Name]` with your registered name and
> have employees sign / acknowledge before they install the MARINA agent. This
> document is what gives you a legal basis under India&apos;s DPDP Act 2023 to
> process their workstation telemetry.

---

## 1. What is MARINA?

`[Company Name]` (&quot;Company&quot;) uses Project MARINA, an AI-assisted workforce
intelligence platform, to operate our team. MARINA helps managers see who&apos;s
shipping, who&apos;s blocked, and who needs support — without keystroke
surveillance or covert monitoring.

## 2. What MARINA will see on your work device

Once you install and consent to the MARINA agent on your **work device only**:

- The **name** of the application currently in the foreground (e.g. &quot;Code&quot;, &quot;Slack&quot;).
- Whether you are **actively typing/clicking** or your machine has gone idle.
- **Optionally** (off by default for our organization), the **foreground window title** — e.g. the file name you are editing.
- **Optionally** (off by default), randomized **screenshots** of your primary display, 2–4 per active hour, with a visible camera flash in the menu bar each time.

In addition, MARINA pulls the following from your work GitHub account (with your OAuth consent):

- Commits, PR opens, reviews given, issues closed — on repositories your employer owns.

## 3. What MARINA will NEVER see

- Keystrokes, mouse coordinates, passwords, or 2FA codes.
- Activity on your personal devices, or on this device while tracking is paused or you are punched out.
- Screenshots while a video call is active (Zoom, Meet, Teams, FaceTime, Webex, BlueJeans).
- File contents, browser history, emails, or chat message contents.

## 4. When MARINA is active

- The agent is only active **between your punch-in and punch-out**.
- One click in the menu bar pauses tracking entirely.
- Pause halts the sampler, the screenshotter, and discards any in-flight uploads.

## 5. Your rights

- **Access**: download all your MARINA data as JSON at any time via `/dashboard → Settings → Export my data`.
- **Erase**: delete your account at any time via `/dashboard → Settings → Delete my account`.
- **Pause**: stop the agent at any time from the menu bar.
- **Object**: contact your manager or `[hr@yourcompany]` to raise concerns about how MARINA is used.

## 6. Manager use

Managers see the following about you:

- Your daily state (Productive / On mission / Blocked / etc.) — a support signal.
- Your end-of-shift work summary and an AI-verified honesty score.
- Your ongoing breaks (with the reason you provided) and your leave requests.

Managers **never see**:

- Raw screenshots (only derived labels like &quot;code editing&quot;, &quot;documents&quot;).
- Anything from outside your punched-in shifts.

## 7. Disciplinary

This policy is for transparency, not enforcement. Productivity scores or
AI-flagged shifts are **decision support** for managers to start conversations,
not automated disciplinary tools.

## 8. Acceptance

By signing below, I acknowledge I have read this policy and consent to the
processing described.

```
Name:        ________________________
Designation: ________________________
Date:        ________________________
Signature:   ________________________
```

---

*This document forms part of your employment terms with `[Company Name]`. It
may be updated; material changes will be notified in writing 30 days in
advance.*
